title: Asymptotic Time, Space, and Growth · Execution Trace: Time Space Tradeoff
summary: Predict which ingestion design survives tenfold and thousandfold load increases. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa time space tradeoff increment in a measured growth-rate decision notebook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compare auxiliary space, retained memory, recomputation, and latency explicitly.
Simplify sums, products, and nested-loop costs while preserving independent dimensions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
